data.content:
The build generates `GeneratedInfo.cs` into `obj/` but never adds it to the `Compile` item group. The SDK's default `*.cs` glob is evaluated at project load time — before any targets run — so the generated file is invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `Compile` (and `FileWrites` for clean support) inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation and clean list -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates a `.cs` file during the build (before `CoreCompile`), but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's default glob for `*.cs` files is evaluated at evaluation time (before any targets run), so the generated file isn't picked up.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, and also to `FileWrites` for clean support. Let me invoke the skill for this.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation and clean list -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly. Here's what was wrong and how it was fixed:

**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes a `.cs` file into `obj/` at build time, but the SDK's default `**/*.cs` glob is evaluated at project load — before any targets execute. So the generated file was never passed to the compiler.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to explicitly include the generated file in `Compile` (so it's compiled) and `FileWrites` (so `dotnet clean` removes it):

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
</ItemGroup>
```
